description: Canonical inventory of caveat enforcers — agenticprimitives-own, ported from smart-agent, and gaps relative to MetaMask DTK. Walked by scripts/check-enforcer-registry.ts (CI rail) + scripts/check-sentinel-enforcers.ts (sentinel-detection lint) + future SDK + UI permission-card rendering. Update this file when shipping a new enforcer; CI will catch drift between the manifest and the source tree.

enforcers.name: TimestampEnforcer
enforcers.summary: validAfter / validUntil window using block.timestamp. Independent port of the spec, not the DTK source.

enforcers.name: AllowedTargetsEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Restricts the redemption target to an allowlist of contract addresses.

enforcers.name: AllowedMethodsEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Restricts the redemption to a function-selector allowlist on whatever target.

enforcers.name: ValueEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Caps the native-token value per redemption. DTK splits per-call vs cumulative; ours is per-call only — cumulative is a phase 8 follow-up.

enforcers.name: QuorumEnforcer
enforcers.summary: n-of-m Safe-compatible signature aggregation caveat. Spec 207 § 5 makes multi-sig caveat-shaped so threshold-policy threads through delegations. DTK does not have this — multi-sig is account-shaped in their framework. Deliberate divergence; see specs/207 § 12 + dtk-alignment-audit.md § 5.4.

enforcers.name: ArgumentRuleEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Per-argument predicate framework. Single enforcer subsumes 4 DTK enforcers + smart-agent's CallDataHashEnforcer. EQ / NEQ / LT / LTE / GT / GTE / IN over ADDRESS / UINT256 / BOOL / BYTES32 / BYTES_HASH. Phase 6c.6 / 7a.

enforcers.name: RateLimitEnforcer
enforcers.summary: N calls per time window. Port from smart-agent — common-enough use case. Phase 7.

enforcers.name: MCP_TOOL_SCOPE_ENFORCER
enforcers.summary: SENTINEL ONLY — SDK exports a non-deployed address. Would revert at redeem. Flagged in dtk-alignment-audit.md § 5.5 for phase 7 cleanup: either ship the contract (port from smart-agent) or remove from SDK exports.

enforcers.name: DATA_SCOPE_ENFORCER
enforcers.summary: SENTINEL ONLY. Same status as MCP_TOOL_SCOPE_ENFORCER.

enforcers.name: DELEGATE_BINDING_ENFORCER
enforcers.summary: SENTINEL ONLY. Cross-delegation delegate binding. Enforcer contract pending phase H5 (cross-delegation in mcp-runtime).

enforcers.name: AllowedCalldataEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Pin exact calldata. Subsumed by the planned ArgumentRuleEnforcer (spec 208).

enforcers.name: ERC20TransferAmountEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Per-call ERC-20 amount gate. Subsumed by the planned ArgumentRuleEnforcer + the ruleErc20Transfer SDK sugar (spec 208).

enforcers.name: ERC20BalanceChangeEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Post-call balance-delta check. Cross-call state — harder. Phase 8.

enforcers.name: LimitedCallsEnforcer
enforcers.summary: N total calls. Could land as a RateLimitEnforcer port (smart-agent has the time-windowed super-set) or its own contract. Phase 7.

enforcers.name: BlockNumberEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Mirror of TimestampEnforcer for block-number windows. Low priority — block.timestamp + clock-skew tolerance covers most use cases.

enforcers.name: DeployedEnforcer
enforcers.summary: Target must / must-not be deployed. Niche. Low priority.

enforcers.name: IdEnforcer
enforcers.summary: DTK uses per-id flag for single-use delegations. We use salt + isRevoked (DelegationManager-level) for the same effect. No contract; covered by existing primitives.
